test_cases.title: Dev mode: extension loaded without errors
test_cases.description: Start dev mode, create session, check console for extension load errors
steps: Check pi process console output for 'Failed to load extension' errors

test_cases.title: Slash commands appear in menu
test_cases.description: Verify /goal, /todos, /workflow appear in slash command menu

test_cases.title: goal_manager tool renders correctly
test_cases.description: Trigger goal_manager tool and verify RenderDescriptor.vue displays task list
steps: Send '/goal' command or message that triggers goal_manager
Verify task list renders in chat with correct status indicators

test_cases.title: Logger writes to xyz-agent directory
steps: Verify file exists and contains log entries

test_cases.title: Logger does not write to pi directory
test_cases.description: Verify no new logs appear in ~/.pi/agent/logs/ from xyz-agent session
steps: Start dev mode session, trigger subagent call

test_cases.title: Production build includes bundled extensions
test_cases.description: Verify npm run build produces Resources with extension directories
steps: Verify goal, todo, subagent, workflow, usage-tracker, hooks, shared directories exist

test_cases.title: Production build excludes evolution-engine
test_cases.description: Verify evolution-engine is not in built Resources
steps: Verify evolution-engine directory does NOT exist

test_cases.title: Extension files are git tracked
test_cases.description: Verify git status shows extension files as tracked
steps: Verify files are tracked (not in untracked or gitignored state)

test_cases.title: Runtime data files remain gitignored
test_cases.description: Verify models.json, settings.json etc are still ignored by git
steps: git status — verify it's listed as ignored
